decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHXRK (dashboard-greeting-text) and ai_RNbBHXRM (dashboard-mode-badge) are intermediate Group wrappers in the parent_id chain under ai_RNbBHXRH. Valid parity-tooling observation, but DASH-02 AC-1 explicitly scopes required data-bubble-id markers to leaf elements ai_RNbBHXRH, ai_RNbBHXRI, ai_RNbBHXRL, ai_RNbBHXRN, and ai_RNbBHXRO — not intermediate groups. criteria_audit AC-1, coverage AC-1, and all AC-bound ui_evidence pass; greeting-name, mode-pill, and coaching-note render in the correct visual stack per layout_notes. Mirrors SHELL-04 C-2/C-3 acceptance pattern: intermediate wrapper markers are ui_refs for tooling but not AC-bound; flattening does not block DASH-03..07 depends_on gates.

IR refs.json confirms ai_RNbBHXRO style_ref resolves to Text_caption_ (12px); implementation uses Text_body_muted_ with redundant text-sm text-muted-foreground Tailwind. Valid style gap and review ui_evidence partial, but AC-1 requires the coaching-note marker and copy binding only — not style_ref token on ai_RNbBHXRO. Marker present, pressure profile text renders correctly, FV-4 passes. One-line bubbleStyle('Text_caption_') swap is DS-01 token-bridge polish per CRISIS-01 C-2 precedent; does not affect coaching mode dropdown, quick actions, or downstream widget composition.

Bubble workflow bTIVW includes an empty-selection branch (bTIVe reset to simplifier) that shadcn Select cannot trigger without an explicit clear/deselect affordance. AC-2 scopes InputChanged parity to updating coaching preference via Supabase on selection; updateCoachingModePreference and FV-1 pass for normal add/set paths. Empty-reset is an edge-case Bubble workflow difference, not a missing AC-2 behavior; no downstream item depends_on requires deselect-to-empty. Record as optional product parity if full bTIVW branch coverage is requested later.

Bubble binds coaching-note to ElementParent.pressure_profile_text; useDashboardUser maps pressureProfile from profile.results.pressure_profile only. calculateUserPressureProfile syncs both onboarding_data.pressure_profile_text and results.pressure_profile on the calculate path, so the primary post-onboarding path is satisfied and FV-4 passes. Users without results but with stale onboarding_data.pressure_profile_text would see the placeholder instead — a pre-results edge case not named in AC-1/FV-4. Preferring onboarding_data with results fallback is a composable hardening polish in useDashboardUser; does not block DASH-03 micro-commitments or other dashboard widgets whose depends_on gates need greeting card mount and coaching mode API already delivered.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Accepted: C-1 intermediate group wrappers ai_RNbBHXRK/ai_RNbBHXRM omitted per AC-1 leaf-marker scope. Deferred: C-2 Text_caption_ style_ref on ai_RNbBHXRO (DS-01 token polish); C-3 bTIVW empty-selection branch (optional workflow parity); C-4 onboarding_data.pressure_profile_text fallback (composable edge-case hardening).
